claim: Rural school enrollment for ages 6-14 was 98.1% in 2024.
scope_or_correction: National rural estimate; not an urban or all-India population estimate.

claim: 23.4% of Std III children could read a Std II text in 2024.
scope_or_correction: 23.4% is government-school children only. The all-children figure is 27.0%; the government-plus-private weighted figure is 27.1%.
Extracted from the 27 state/UT pages in the ASER 2024 report. ASER is a rural household survey.

claim: ED reports a 93.33% PMLA conviction rate.
scope_or_correction: This is 56 convictions among 60 completed trials, not convictions divided by all ECIRs.

claim: 56 conviction outcomes represent about 0.63% of 8,851 ECIRs recorded.
scope_or_correction: A pipeline-throughput ratio, not a court conviction rate; cases have different vintages and long lags.

claim: Aggregate ED statistics prove selective partisan enforcement.
scope_or_correction: The official aggregate table has no party-coded case data. A selectivity study needs a separately verified politician-case panel and comparable timing/status fields.

claim: The ECI published SBI electoral-bond purchase and redemption disclosures in March 2024.
scope_or_correction: Raw disclosure is public; linking it causally to enforcement requires entity matching, dates, and a defensible identification design.

claim: Low case throughput and high conviction share among completed trials can coexist.
scope_or_correction: FATF's 2024 mutual evaluation notes case delays, legal challenges, and a small number of concluded cases.
